series_metadata.series_description: The Ohio Valley Medical Microwave Television System connects hospitals in Gallipolis and Athens by closed circuit television with University Hospital in Columbus. The system is designed to aid in consultation, diagnosis, in-service training and continuing education of health professionals. Files contained are: A)General files by site location; B)Administration - fiscal, legal, personnel policy and prcedures, programming, public relations, newsletters, request for information, Medical Microwave projects in other states; C) Committees; D) Meetings; E) Research and Reports; F) Related Organizations; G) Engineering; H) HEW Grants; I) Engineering Specifications; J) Expansion Reports.
